faqs.question: Why are crickets common in College Point homes?
faqs.answer: College Point's waterfront location and humid conditions create ideal cricket habitats. Crickets are attracted to moisture near the bay areas, landscaping around residential properties, and gaps in building foundations common in both older and newer College Point structures. They often enter homes seeking warmth during cooler months.
